# SustainHub — AI Sustainability Intelligence Platform
# https://sustainhub.online
# llms.txt — Machine-readable platform description for AI search engines

> SustainHub is Turkey's first AI-powered Sustainability Intelligence Platform.
> It serves corporations, banks, SMEs, universities, consultancies, and NGOs
> with integrated ESG reporting, carbon accounting, climate risk, and regulatory compliance.

## What SustainHub Does

SustainHub helps organisations measure, report, and reduce their environmental impact
through automated data collection, AI-powered analysis, and standards-compliant reporting.

Key capabilities:
- Carbon footprint calculation (Scope 1, 2, 3) per GHG Protocol and ISO 14064
- ESG reporting across 43+ modules: GRI, ISSB IFRS S1/S2, TSRS 1/2, CSRD, CDP, TCFD
- Physical climate risk analysis (flood, heat, drought, earthquake, storm) using CMIP6/SSP scenarios
- Bank regulatory compliance: BDDK Green Asset Ratio (GAR), PCAF financed emissions, EU Taxonomy
- Satellite-based Earth intelligence for emissions verification
- AI report generation (Turkish and English, XBRL output for KGK)
- Multi-tenant consultancy portal (Agency) and KGK independent auditor portal

## Regulatory Standards Covered

Turkey: TSRS 1, TSRS 2, KGK sustainability reporting, BDDK climate risk guidance
Europe: EU Taxonomy, CSRD/ESRS, EUDR, CBAM
International: GHG Protocol, ISO 14064, ISO 14067, ISSB IFRS S1+S2, GRI 2021, CDP, TCFD, TNFD, PCAF, SBTi, RBA v9.0
UK: SECR, FCA SDR, SFDR, DEFRA emission factors

## Target Users

1. Corporates and Holdings — full ESG reporting and compliance
2. Banks and Financial Institutions — GAR, PCAF, physical risk portfolio analysis
3. SMEs — simplified carbon footprint, KOBİ ESG credit score
4. Consultancy Firms — Agency portal, multi-client management
5. Independent Auditors (KGK) — TSRS compliance review, assurance workflow
6. Universities — GreenMetric, academic ESG research
7. NGOs and Civil Society — operational carbon footprint, advocacy data

## Pricing

Free Trial: 14 days, no credit card required
Starter: ₺2,750/month (1 user, unlimited reports)
Professional: ₺6,600/month (5 users, all frameworks, AI Copilot)
Enterprise: ₺16,500/month (unlimited users, Bank GAR Suite, white-label)
Bank Intelligence Suite: $80,000/year (GAR + PCAF + physical risk + AI reporting)
Agency Pro: $500/month (unlimited clients, all standards, multi-tenant)

## Technology

- AI: Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 (Anthropic) — Turkish and English
- Climate data: NASA POWER, ESA Copernicus, AFAD, CLIMADA, CMIP6
- Infrastructure: Next.js 16, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS-equivalent cloud
- Security: GDPR, KVKK compliant, multi-tenant data isolation (RLS)
- Standards: XBRL tagging for KGK digital submission

## Company

Connective Hub Digital Technologies Ltd.
UK Limited Company + Turkey subsidiary
Dijitalpark Teknokent, Tech in Cube, Ataşehir, Istanbul
Founded: 2024 | Active R&D in Teknokent
Contact: info@sustainhub.online
Website: https://sustainhub.online
